title: Municipality holds talks with AfriForum
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Municipal manager Lulamile Mapholoba and municipal staff members \"held a productive engagement with representatives from AfriForum on Thursday 23 January\", says the municipality.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Municipal manager Lulamile Mapholoba and municipal staff members \"held a productive engagement with representatives from AfriForum on Thursday 23 January\", says the municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The open and frank discussions laid the groundwork for potential collaboration, focusing on tapping into AfriForum's expertise and exploring project management opportunities to benefit the town,\" it said.","html":"\"The open and frank discussions laid the groundwork for potential collaboration, focusing on tapping into AfriForum's expertise and exploring project management opportunities to benefit the town,\" it said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Memorandum of understanding","html":"Memorandum of understanding"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"A formal proposal, which will serve as the foundation for a Memorandum of Understanding between the organisations, is expected to follow soon.","html":"\"A formal proposal, which will serve as the foundation for a Memorandum of Understanding between the organisations, is expected to follow soon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The meeting emphasised the importance of working with organisations and individuals who share a vested interest in Knysna's future, reinforcing our vision of fostering partnerships for an inclusive, innovative and inspired Greater Knysna.","html":"\"The meeting emphasised the importance of working with organisations and individuals who share a vested interest in Knysna's future, reinforcing our vision of fostering partnerships for an inclusive, innovative and inspired Greater Knysna."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We are now awaiting AfriForum's formal proposal, after which a follow-up meeting will be scheduled."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"As a legislated entity, the municipality must ensure that all agreements align with policy and legal requirements.\"","html":"\"As a legislated entity, the municipality must ensure that all agreements align with policy and legal requirements.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"AfriForum said Mapholoba \"emphasised the importance of involving community organisations who share a vested interest in Knysna's future, and welcomed AfriForum's expertise\".","html":"AfriForum said Mapholoba \"emphasised the importance of involving community organisations who share a vested interest in Knysna's future, and welcomed AfriForum's expertise\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Future collaboration'","html":"'Future collaboration'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The frank and open discussions laid the groundwork for future collaboration, and we look forward to making a formal proposal for a Memorandum of Understanding soon,\" Marthinus Erasmus, AfriForum's district coordinator for the Southern Cape, said.","html":"\"The frank and open discussions laid the groundwork for future collaboration, and we look forward to making a formal proposal for a Memorandum of Understanding soon,\" Marthinus Erasmus, AfriForum's district coordinator for the Southern Cape, said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"In 2024, AfriForum found that the Sedgefield (landfill) site achieved only 22% compliance with the minimum legal requirements for the management of landfill sites, while the Knysna site achieved a shocking 12% compliance.","html":"\"In 2024, AfriForum found that the Sedgefield (landfill) site achieved only 22% compliance with the minimum legal requirements for the management of landfill sites, while the Knysna site achieved a shocking 12% compliance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"These results are indicative of the overall mismanagement that prevails at these sites and highlight the seriousness of the situation.","html":"\"These results are indicative of the overall mismanagement that prevails at these sites and highlight the seriousness of the situation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Share findings'","html":"'Share findings'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We look forward to working with the municipality in 2025 to put the residents' interests first.","html":"\"We look forward to working with the municipality in 2025 to put the residents' interests first."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"AfriForum will again audit the sites in Sedgefield and Knysna in February as part of our annual landfill audit project to determine if there is improvement.","html":"\"AfriForum will again audit the sites in Sedgefield and Knysna in February as part of our annual landfill audit project to determine if there is improvement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We will share our findings with the municipality so that solutions can be put in place.\"","html":"\"We will share our findings with the municipality so that solutions can be put in place.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
